sales.alt: Advanced AI Sales Capabilities dashboard and analytics

postPurchase.alt: Post-purchase engagement and customer retention strategies

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Hello! Thanks for reaching out to PrimeNest Realty. I’m your AI sales assistant, available 24/7 to help you find the right property. How can I assist you today?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Hi, I was browsing your website and wanted to know more about available flats in this area.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Great! I’d be happy to help with that. To guide you better, may I ask — are you looking to buy for self-use or investment?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Mostly for investment.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Perfect. And are you interested in a specific configuration, like a 1 BHK, 2 BHK, or 3 BHK?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: A 2 BHK would be ideal.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: That’s a popular choice for investors. Currently, we have multiple 2 BHK options available in this locality, priced between ₹82 and ₹90 lakhs, with strong rental demand. May I ask — are you looking for ready-to-move or under-construction properties?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Preferably ready-to-move.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Understood. Based on that, I have a few high-performing options that match your requirement. Typically, a ready-to-move 2 BHK here earns around ₹32,000 to ₹36,000 per month in rent, with steady appreciation. Would you like to see rental yield details, schedule a virtual property tour, or speak with a property consultant?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: I’d like a virtual tour first.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Great choice. I can schedule a virtual tour for you right away. Does tomorrow at 5:00 PM work for you?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Yes, that works.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Perfect. Your virtual tour is scheduled for tomorrow at 5:00 PM. You’ll receive the meeting link along with property details via WhatsApp and email.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Before we wrap up, may I ask — are you planning to purchase within the next 3 months, or are you still exploring options?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Probably within the next 2 to 3 months.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: That’s great to hear. Based on your timeline, I recommend connecting with one of our senior property consultants who can guide you on pricing trends, negotiation, and financing options. Would you like me to arrange a callback?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Yes, that would be helpful.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Done. I’ve scheduled a callback for you. Our consultant will reach out within 24 hours, and they’ll already have the context of our conversation.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Is there anything else I can help you with today?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: No, that’s all. Thanks for the help.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: You’re very welcome. I look forward to assisting you throughout your property journey. Have a great day!
